title: mecardonia procumbens var. procumbens
intro: Mecardonia procumbens var. procumbens, also known as creeping mariola or creeping primrose, is a low-growing, herbaceous plant native to eastern North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Mecardonia procumbens var. procumbens can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
